title: Reciprocal Communication between FAPs and Muscle Cells via Distinct Extracellular Vesicle miRNAs
author: qingyong meng
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: 1 Metadata: Introduction of experimental design and protocol 2 Known-miRNA map-MCEVPs: Small RNA reads from MC-EVPs were mapped against miRBase to identify known miRNAs. 3 Known-miRNA map-FAPEVPs: Small RNA reads from FAP-EVPs were mapped against miRBase to identify known miRNAs. 4 Readcount-TMP-1: The expression of known miRNAs was normalized by TPM (Transcripts per million). 5 FAP-EVPs vs MCEVPs. differential analysis: Differential expressed miRNAs were analyzed by DEGseq and filtered with qvalue 1.
